questions.question: Name two causes of water scarcity.
questions.answer: Population growth and over-exploitation of groundwater.

questions.question: Why is agriculture the largest consumer of water?
questions.answer: Because irrigation requires large amounts of water for crop production.

questions.question: What is the main function of multipurpose river projects?
questions.answer: To provide irrigation, electricity generation, and flood control.

questions.question: Name one disadvantage of large dams.
questions.answer: They may displace local communities.

questions.question: What environmental problem is caused by excessive irrigation?
questions.answer: Soil salinisation.

questions.question: Why are traditional water harvesting systems important?
questions.answer: They conserve water and suit local climatic conditions.

questions.question: Name one traditional water harvesting system used in Rajasthan.
questions.answer: Johads.

questions.question: What is the purpose of rooftop rainwater harvesting?
questions.answer: To collect rainwater and recharge groundwater.

questions.question: Why do cities face groundwater depletion?
questions.answer: Due to excessive pumping of groundwater.

questions.question: Which river project is built on the Mahanadi river?
questions.answer: Hirakud dam.

questions.question: Which river has the Bhakra Nangal project?
questions.answer: Sutlej River.

questions.question: What is the main aim of water conservation?
questions.answer: To ensure sustainable use of water resources.

questions.question: Why is rainwater harvesting necessary in urban areas?
questions.answer: Because urban surfaces reduce natural groundwater recharge.

questions.question: What role do dams play in hydroelectric power generation?
questions.answer: They store water which is used to turn turbines and generate electricity.

questions.question: What is the main reason for water pollution in rivers?
questions.answer: Industrial waste discharge.

questions.question: Which irrigation system minimizes water wastage?
questions.answer: Bamboo drip irrigation system.

questions.question: What is groundwater recharge?
questions.answer: The process by which water seeps into the ground and replenishes aquifers.

questions.question: Which factor increases water demand in agriculture?
questions.answer: Population growth.

questions.question: Name one environmental impact of dams.
questions.answer: Disturbance of natural river ecosystems.

questions.question: What is the function of reservoirs?
questions.answer: To store water for irrigation, electricity generation, and water supply.

questions.question: Why is water management important?
questions.answer: To ensure proper distribution and sustainable use of water.

questions.question: Which region uses bamboo drip irrigation?
questions.answer: Meghalaya in Northeast India.

questions.question: What problem reduces the storage capacity of reservoirs?
questions.answer: Sedimentation.

questions.question: What is sustainable water use?
questions.answer: Using water resources carefully so they remain available for future generations.

questions.question: Why are water resources important for economic development?
questions.answer: They support agriculture, industry, and energy production.
